sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data CLOB, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Hello', '2020-09-28 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, created_at) VALUES (2, NULL, '2020-09-29 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, created_at) VALUES (3, 'World', '2020-09-30 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, created_at) VALUES (4, 'Fuzz', '2020-09-29 23:59:59');
SELECT sys.group_concat(data) FROM test_table WHERE created_at + (INTERVAL '1' SECOND * 86400) >= '2020-09-30 00:00:00' AND data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sys.group_concat(data) FROM (SELECT data, created_at + INTERVAL '1' SECOND * 60 AS adjusted_time FROM test_table) AS sub WHERE adjusted_time < '2020-09-30 00:00:00' GROUP BY adjusted_time;
SELECT sys.group_concat(NULLIF(data, '')) FROM test_table WHERE created_at + (INTERVAL '1' SECOND * (7 * 24 * 60 * 60)) <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
SELECT sys.group_concat(data) FROM test_table GROUP BY (created_at + INTERVAL '1' SECOND) HAVING COUNT(data) > 1;
SELECT sys.group_concat(data || ' at ' || (created_at + INTERVAL '1' SECOND * 60)) AS concatenated_info FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
